scripts.bootstrap-cli: pnpm --filter=vite-plus build && cp -r ./packages/cli/binding/*.node ./packages/global/dist && pnpm --filter=@vite-plus/global build && npm install -g ./packages/global
scripts.bootstrap-cli:ci: pnpm --filter=vite-plus build:ts && pnpm --filter=@vite-plus/global build && npm install -g ./packages/global
